observation.command: cd /workspace/YatCC && sed -i 's/node->op = node->kLor;/node->op = node->kOr;/g' task/2/antlr/Ast2Asg.cpp && sed -i 's/node->op = node->kLand;/node->op = node->kAnd;/g' task/2/antlr/Ast2Asg.cpp && sed -i 's/node->op = node->kRem;/node->op = node->kMod;/g' task/2/antlr/Ast2Asg.cpp && sed -i 's/ret->op = ret->kXor;/ret->op = ret->kAnd;/g' task/2/antlr/Ast2Asg.cpp
